title: Ahrefs vs FullStory
description: Compare Ahrefs vs FullStory — a marketing & seo platform versus a analytics & data solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Ahrefs (Marketing & SEO) and FullStory (Analytics & Data) serve different primary purposes. Ahrefs has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is marketing & seo or analytics & data capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Ahrefs and FullStory?
faqs.answer: Ahrefs is a marketing & seo tool, while FullStory is a analytics & data platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Ahrefs replace FullStory?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Ahrefs or FullStory?
faqs.answer: Ahrefs ($129–$449/mo) and FullStory ($99/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
